meta.title: Your Graph Title
meta.subtitle: A 1-2 sentence description of the landscape this graph maps. Explains to the viewer what the nodes and connections represent and why they matter.
meta.note: Click or hover on nodes to explore connections. Drag nodes to reposition. Press D to dump positions to console, S to export SVG, P to export PNG.

Author, Year.title: Full title of the cited work

nodes.label:
Central
Concept
nodes.description: The anchoring concept of the graph. This is the node everything else connects to. It frames the question or theme the graph explores.

nodes.label: Concept A1
nodes.description: Description of this concept. Can reference sources using parenthetical citations like (Author, Year). Multiple citations in one group use semicolons: (Author, Year; Second Author, Year).

nodes.label: Concept A2
nodes.description: Another concept in Cluster A. Related to concept_a1 but distinct.

nodes.label: Concept B1
nodes.description: A concept in Cluster B. Descriptions should be 1-3 sentences: enough to orient the reader without overwhelming.
